# UA Quiz — Ukraine Quiz Platform

> Interactive map with quizzes about all 26 regions of Ukraine.
> AI-powered explanations, achievements, leaderboard, and multilingual support.

## What this site does
UA Quiz is an educational web application that helps users learn about Ukraine through interactive quizzes. Users can:
- Explore an interactive map of Ukraine with 26 clickable regions
- Take quizzes about geography, history, culture, and architecture of each region
- Get AI-powered explanations after each answer (powered by Claude)
- Generate new quiz questions with AI for unlimited content
- Track progress with achievements and badges
- Compete on a leaderboard
- Play in different game modes: Learn, Exam, Marathon
- Share results with friends via social media

## Key information
- **Languages**: Ukrainian (primary), English
- **Regions covered**: All 26 oblasts of Ukraine including Crimea
- **Free to use**: No registration required for basic quizzes
- **AI features**: Claude AI provides explanations and generates questions
- **Data source**: Community-created quizzes stored in Firebase

## Contact
- Website: https://uaquiz.vercel.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/romkravets/quizer
